developer_health_checks: the legacy `sentinel` command runs six public developer health checks; it is not the Stage-0 gate or hidden escrow

missing_evidence.requirement: canonical Bazel workspace, crate target parity, and clean-checkout Stage-0 suite
frozen public mission battery and category floors
operator-mounted root-of-trust and hidden-sentinel escrow validation
B0-approved atomic Git admission, durable journal, descendant inheritance, and rollback
digest-checked constitutional semantics with non-vacuous executable invariants
end-to-end capability and ingress boundary enforcement
